case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MICHAEL DENNY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO MICHAEL DENNY, IS PARTIALLY GRANTED AND PARTIALLY DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $1,300. OF THE HELD FUNDS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR, AND THE REMAINING BALANCE OF THE HELD FUNDS TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Denny, T:415.750.9340, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf;
Roger E. Jackson, Esq. of the Law Offices of Roger E. Jackson, T:707.318.2994, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The parties could not agree as to whether the Sheriff's Office is holding any funds at this time. At the conclusion of argument, the Court takes PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's HEARING ON THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MICHAEL DENNY under submission. The court shall issue an order either taking the matter off calendar or disbursing the funds pending receipt of the Claim of Exemption packet from the San Francisco Sheriff's Office. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Jan-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Alisa J. Kim of the law offices of Alisa J. Kim (510-736-6293) appears as counsel for judgment creditor/plaintiff

Michael Denny (415-750-9340) appears as self-represented exemption claimant/judgment debtor/defendant

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Claimant submits additional information for the court's consideration.

HEARING ON PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S OBJECTION TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to January 4, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302/Law and Motion. Notice is waived.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR No. 5525, e-mail: vgross@sftc.org. (L&M302)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sydney E. Fairbairn, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.883.2199, for plaintiffs;
Michael F. Denny, in pro per, Tel. 415.608.0269, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION as to Michael Denny, is partially granted and partially denied. The levying officer is directed to release $1,300. of the held funds to the judgment creditor, and the remaining balance of the held funds to the judgment debtor. The Court will prepare the written order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
